page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, 64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The defining hardware characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 47244 GB of HDD capacity.

Benchmark data reveals a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng single-core scoring 1108.59, which falls into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression rated as poor at 19.12 GB/sec. However, multi-core performance is average, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 11778.16 and a PassMark CPU score of 12996.41. Memory performance is mixed; while large-block read and write bandwidths are average at 64.44 GB/sec and 52.71 GB/sec respectively, the PassMark memory score falls into the bottom 25 percent at 1803.09.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.d1ne.4xlarge is its reliance on high-capacity HDD storage rather than NVMe SSDs, combined with older CPU architecture. This configuration offers high storage density and qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive capacity without the need for high random IOPS. It is suited for large-scale data warehousing, MapReduce jobs, cold data storage, and big data analytics. It is less suitable for latency-sensitive databases or high-performance computing tasks that demand rapid single-core execution or fast storage access times.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.4xlarge is an x86_64 storage-focused server equipped with an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor, offering 16 dedicated physical cores at 2.5 GHz, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 12 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. Its most prominent feature is 47244 GB of bundled local HDD storage. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core scoring in the bottom 25 percent, while multi-core performance and memory bandwidth remain average. The PassMark memory score is also weak, reflecting the older hardware architecture. This server provides high storage density and qualitative cost efficiency for capacity-driven workloads. It is best suited for big data processing, MapReduce, and large-scale sequential data storage, where massive storage volume is prioritized over high random I/O performance or raw single-threaded compute speed.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 47244 GB of local HDD storage, offering high storage density for big data and sequential processing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.4xlarge is a storage-focused server with 16 dedicated cores, 64 GB RAM, and 47244 GB of bundled local HDD storage.
tagline: A storage-dense server featuring massive bundled HDD capacity and dedicated multi-core processing for large-scale sequential data workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
Massive 47244 GB of bundled local HDD storage capacity
64.0 GB of system memory with average large-block read and write bandwidth
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for data transfer
Suited for big data analytics, MapReduce, and cold storage workloads
Weak single-core performance but average multi-core processing capabilities
